title: NFT-fi on Hyperliquid with @hypurrblades
summary_title: Hyperblades' NFT lending, launchpad, and mystery game launching on Hyperliquid within two weeks
summary_description: Four-person team building lending platform, raffle-based launchpad, and play-to-earn game. Testnet in two days, mainnet in less than two weeks.

key_moments.label: Zerk introduces Hyperblades and their Hyperliquid NFT-fi stack
10,000 contract requests handled smoothly on testnet mint
Lending platform lets users test-drive NFTs for up to seven days
Raffle system differentiates launchpad from competitors like Drip
Timeline: testnet in two days, mainnet in less than two weeks
Play-to-earn game teased as imposter-type game
Team of seven: three full-time devs, one game designer, one UX designer, one manager
Built in three months; major VC partnership coming soon

pull_quote: You can just borrow money against your NFT as collateral, or lend money to test it for up to seven days before deciding whether to buy it.
